instruction.text:
UlwLoop aggregate-goal handoff
Mode: aggregate
Plan: .omo/ulw-loop/embedding-sqlite/goals.json
Ledger: .omo/ulw-loop/embedding-sqlite/ledger.jsonl
Goal: G001-c001-red-green-prove-current-sqlite — C001 RED/GREEN: prove current SQLite chunk embedding path is missing,...

Active goal:
- id: G001-c001-red-green-prove-current-sqlite
- title: C001 RED/GREEN: prove current SQLite chunk embedding path is missing,...
- objective: C001 RED/GREEN: prove current SQLite chunk embedding path is missing, then store GMS text-embedding-3-small vectors on CompanySourceChunk with embedding_status transitions and no private data embedded.

Success criteria:
- [C001] [essential] (happy) happy path for: C001 RED/GREEN: prove current SQLite chunk embedding path is missing, then st... — expect: Replace via revise_criterion with observable happy-path proof for goal 1. — status: pass
- [C002] [essential] (edge) edge case (boundary/empty/malformed) — expect: Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: C001 RED/GREEN: prove current SQLite chunk embedding path is missing, then st.... — status: pass
- [C003] [non-essential] (regression) regression: adjacent surface still works — expect: Replace via revise_criterion with regression proof for neighboring behavior after: C001 RED/GREEN: prove current SQLite chunk embedding path is missing, then st.... — status: pass

Codex goal integration constraints:
- Use the create_goal payload exactly as rendered: objective only.
- Goals are unlimited. Do not add numeric limits.
- Codex goal = the whole omo ulw-loop run; OMO G001/G002/etc. = ledger stories.
- First call get_goal. If no active goal exists, call create_goal with the aggregate payload below.
- If get_goal reports the same aggregate objective as active, continue this OMO story without creating a new Codex goal.
- If a different active or incomplete Codex goal exists, finish/checkpoint that goal before starting this ulw-loop.
- This is not the final story: do not call update_goal mid-aggregate; checkpoint this OMO ledger story and continue the remaining stories. update_goal is reserved for the final story after the mandatory quality gate passes.
- This is not the final ulw-loop story; do not run the final reviewer/manual-QA/gate-review quality gate yet.
- Checkpoint this OMO story with a fresh get_goal snapshot whose objective matches the aggregate payload.
- If blocked or failed, checkpoint with --status failed and the failure evidence; rerun complete-goals --session-id embedding-sqlite --retry-failed to resume.
